textByHash.fa5bd9bb67ea0b95872c18a85fb185b2e40c26cc: Blooming, thieving, weirdo cultists! Why don't they leave me alone? String 'em all up, that's what I say!
textByHash.aa8b0be7d627af8bdd9c8fb7201ac82ea586f963: It's those blooming cultists from the forest! Those freaks keep breaking into my house!
textByHash.4d6a7a86f9f248debdd029479dba2313057da966: They first broke in months ago and stole a suit of armour. The strange thing is that they've broken in four times since but taken nothing.
textByHash.a2e2eaed75d1c3490dc892dffa18c3ffa448a275: Why, I am Sir Ceril Carnillean! We really are quite a famous bloodline... who've played a vital role in the politics of Ardougne for many generations.
textByHash.c93b5aeaa0276765cbfa2d35bb865b7ff4ed3313: Perhaps you would be able to assist me in returning the stolen armour? For a modest cash reward of course!
textByHash.fe19dbc6ae9e1e3c066da6478264f6716d5ef200: No wonder I'm the one with the big house, and you're the one on the streets.
textByHash.bbce6d6f618e050f038583b286f9d792c6623625: That's very noble of you sirrah! I caught a glimpse of the thieves leaving but due to... uh.. yeah, my cold I was unable to give chase.
textByHash.ae4fd43d0a6e17a436dc503307cc7a44ec47bbae: They're some kind of crazy cult who dress all in black, and hang out near the cave entrance in the forest south of here.
textByHash.c2b92a4d85931980a62c1d539872b9370f7db61b: My old butler, Higson, once followed them to their hideout there. Unfortunately the next night he died in his sleep.
textByHash.9878c09749c62e2d96651ac60e189929bf56b739: No, it's ok. A replacement arrived the next day. He's been great - cooks an excellent broth!
textByHash.6d6b2a003637a0af78bfa16022bceabd5c022ee1: And who are YOU to judge ME? Hmmm. You look like a peasant anyway. I'm wasting my time talking to you.
textByHash.9341471a3c72d566c20bcb6234bedb42069a4495: Yes, I doubt you could help anyway.
textByHash.39a930d98f5e3c2304d126dc792f399ab3592462: Have you had any luck yet?
textByHash.650302ae228f1eec27bd29eabcb7589455785927: That's SIR Ceril you blooming scoundrel! Show respect when addressing someone of my rank! It's strange you haven't recovered it yet though as Jones seemed quite sure of their location.
textByHash.1fceaac1d6c594023a278e0a60e14451827504eb: That's SIR Ceril to you, you impudent scamp. Show a bit of respect to your betters. And shouldn't you be recovering my armour?
textByHash.a004106438ff7c940a0ec123eadde985bfbaa384: SIR Ceril to you. But good work there! BLOOMING good work! Hand over the armour then.
textByHash.93cbf13dc1863864f614ce4f559986facde1926e: Nope, they're obviously a bunch of blooming loonies! Go find them and bring me back my blooming armour! Nobody steals from Sir Ceril Carnillean!!!
textByHash.777904e6cc0eddef4c6f4cf1ed048667bce8c823: Well what are you waiting for? I'm not paying you to blooming sight see you know!
textByHash.bd75cc4a43c3c7f87ee9b81fde7603b51956400c: Well done! I must say I am very impressed! Come on, hand it over.
textByHash.05b3d4e5573caf11ddd4b8e4f3e91bd3707dc899: Before we send you on your way with your payment, I'll just get Jones to whip you up a batch of his special broth.
textByHash.8e1fc61c598b7b0a153f8f43f60e032493f04943: W-what? RIGHT! You! Come with me upstairs! We're going to blooming well sort this out right now once and for all!
textByHash.2666c6a638dcd2d5654f3200a78e6d5c03d1cc59: W-what? RIGHT! You! We're going to blooming well sort this out right now once and for all!
textByHash.aedc3d1a17643c3b56b1f531ceeb0192b62a3b68: Jones! This commoner says you had something to do with the theft of my armour. What do you have to say for yourself about that?
textByHash.2d4c09fe634b7a7611917bb289ce755312d960cd: Humph. Quite right too. I cannot fathom why this scoundrel would accuse you of such a crime without evidence to back up his accusations.
textByHash.cfb5a12366f42412be6cd3054135487eeffa513e: Right. I have decided. I have given my word as a nobleman to reward you for your efforts in retrieving my armour.
textByHash.8cde99f406a14964f77c84cc153a94a9476df6b9: but I must also compensate Jones for this terrible slander you have made against him.
textByHash.cbca1b02763f0af4ea4300116f618f1b5acccae4: Now take it and leave you scoundrel! And don't darken my doorstep again!
textByHash.5c318d49370605b7e4165912885c5c33cc5550b5: I owe you nothing you scoundrel! Now get out or I'll have Jones throw you out!
textByHash.01aa9364ee720a7c9de56533b31683c280eff4cd: What do you want now you scoundrel?
textByHash.356301551ddf6bcc854a55cca4053912d08c62da: I... I don't believe it! Poison! JONES!
textByHash.2d489f01ba4cba872bde9f6478098ff4efa8b242: JONES! Just WHAT is this POISON doing here???
textByHash.3cb4819b1269418902cecaf133bb26a92044fafa: Rats eh? Yes, fair enough. Sorry to have doubted you old boy.
textByHash.54ae247c74035ef63ddc53637f6c91df601d3e6d: Wh-what??? I've seen this amulet before... The thieves that broke in... One of them was wearing an identical amulet! Jones! I don't believe it!
textByHash.45f331ae0da0d9b2f61632edc8c748c546f6915f: Jones! We trusted you! We took you into our home!
textByHash.04f4c922e325876acaf041970c43134a1aa5cb45: To think we took you in and trusted you... and this is how you repay us...
textByHash.04582573b0f28ea3d39f24f45f0da656697d3cc9: Take him away. Attempted murder and burglary.
textByHash.010b364639f65464621b417f58285af112adfc47: It looks like I am indebted to you sirrah!
textByHash.5964bdf84ee37df2ded8914b06821e3a58bc020e: But if it weren't for you... My whole family... we could have been... I apologise for my harshness before.
textByHash.4a60902a6c93d48e46a186d70e241a972db1f682: the very least I can do is to reward you for your noble efforts, and to offer my sincerest apologies as a Lord and gentleman.
textByHash.fb92eab82f74b05b1629ede07dbe236111bf80f5: No, no, thank YOU! Feel free to stop by anytime adventurer!
textByHash.4c790a79b41805e901832e8fdcb9bb90daa0ad83: Oh.. the inhumanity... the cruelty.. the misery... the pain... my son is a good boy, really, but how could he give his dinner to Scruffy without having the servants test it for poison first? How? How could he be so
textByHash.e6d28a2328c98e595fe03199233a8fd9040fbff9: thoughtless and careless? He knows we are all under threat!
textByHash.f864fdd7f560219dccc8dd9f7c55552641b3923b: He's been with our family for twenty years... that's 140 in dog years! The poor dog... what did HE ever do to deserve such a fate???
textByHash.8105283a2be215c9d5807fb75f8fa2ca7dc38388: I agree! I hope whichever evildoer is responsible gets the full weight of the law brought upon them!
textByHash.097a40ebc18429e5cdd4b381a004301e4a634b16: Oh cruel world! Scruffy... I knew you well... I... just... don't think I can... go on without...
textByHash.6464329cb42546d76308c19ec02596a9b3c2b9c6: SIR Ceril! SIR! And I'm not sure but I think the thieves have been back in my house.
textByHash.37f7ba17caac261bed1d9154e75d5b0c4d657d45: Well, either I'm going crazy, or theres been an intruder in Jones' room upstairs!
textByHash.ae24d7d39094dffc7a17d9442a62f2a752b18091: Blooming, thieving cultists! Why don't they leave me alone? String them all up, that's what I say!
textByHash.43372320e74cd4d8bd69469212f80f81c8e098ee: It's those blooming cultists from the south! They keep breaking into my house!
textByHash.b40d5b37cc91915c760ac6f42bfb96bad88d0007: Well... no. They stole a suit of armour when they first broke in months ago, but they've been back four more times since then and taken nothing.
textByHash.809a5f26fc17959e1311926cddd88e1432bb3da0: You don't know me? Why, I am Sir Ceril Carnillean! Mine is quite a famous bloodline, you know. We've played a vital role in the politics of Ardougne for many generations.
textByHash.cef8c2897877e9078b3f3e813b04bd5d001fecbe: Interesting... I suppose the authorities haven't been much help so far. Yes, very well. If you return the stolen armour, I will provide you with a modest cash reward!
textByHash.06e940f218488469e94c97a3a4504942fffa4fcb: That's very noble of you! Keep that attitude up and one day you might have the honour of working full-time for someone like me.
textByHash.36e860d2d6d1fed8760d3b0f14902c4b6c2e46ce: Now, I caught a glimpse of the thieves leaving, but due to... uh... my cold, I was unable to give chase.
textByHash.b55e4b49b3ba99b4132241f65a18d10684145869: What I do know is that they belong to some sort of cult. They seem to be based in a cave just south of the city, near the Clock Tower.
textByHash.00561f8992cfa09c0280e07f1626d02641b3cfc7: My old butler, Higson, once followed them there. Unfortunately, the next night he died in his sleep.
textByHash.b5e5366901fb3f994c22f4dddd242b990c24931f: No, it's okay. Jones, a replacement from the Servants' Guild, arrived the next day. He's been great - makes an excellent broth!
textByHash.591fe2f3de19e3617de8e65766d6a2911b743ffa: Well no wonder I'm the one with the big house and you're the one on the streets.
textByHash.22c4af33478530abe943739c277ec84642f90771: And who are you to judge me? You look like a peasant anyway. I'm wasting my time talking to you.
textByHash.46b89d6d738317dbd91c0fafc3c7efdbe2cf421c: That's Sir Ceril to you, you impudent scamp. Show a bit of respect to your betters. Now, shouldn't you be recovering my armour?
textByHash.9aa17d843294db554d5b7add32511b2cb5ed2aa0: Good. I suggest you start with that cave south of the city, near the Clock Tower. That is where the cult is based.
textByHash.4ac405ea3e93ccf9317899e22ea615df69237f7a: You're back. Have you had any luck yet?
textByHash.8136ae9f7a205322e89bd5cfbb762f2c17203367: What? Right! You! We're going to blooming well sort this out right now, once and for all!
textByHash.dcfdd20fcbac547fd376b60815776dd3c752d5fc: Jones! This commoner says you had something to do with the cultists that stole my armour. What do you have to say for yourself?
textByHash.d5109a52a169222859123e7f7bc40a449e21c401: Humph. Quite right too. I cannot fathom why this scoundrel would accuse you of such a crime without evidence to back up the accusations.
textByHash.5cd3e3ac2c5b0e7921e157919a1304ec15a2b26e: Right, I have made a decision. I have given my word as a nobleman to reward you for your efforts in retrieving my armour, but I must also compensate Jones for this terrible slander.
textByHash.4f1df7116987cb0ddd94247f38adc36cb79a7e75: Now take this and leave! And don't darken my doorstep again!
textByHash.687d0f36527c22a1775a3f1078a7218f071ae784: Right... but this amulet... I recognise this! Those cultists wore amulets like this!
textByHash.cdace8ea78bf6707746675af8459507adfc9aea8: This man is one of those cultists! Take him away!
textByHash.662abf3ea0a2e9921a8bcebf9532a442f130cf0d: Well... It looks like I am indebted to you!
textByHash.423d7869efa3879e1b67a6d68556de1d46bb9b85: But if it weren't for you... my whole family... we could have been...
textByHash.83bf58a23f7c792717ceb0900cf231a947465057: I apologise for my harshness before. The very least I can do is to reward you for your noble efforts, and to offer my sincerest apologies as a gentleman.
textByHash.6dad45e1c233c3a3dfe09b7c7b32c391a3b3b57c: No, no, thank you! Feel free to stop by anytime, adventurer!
textByHash.c61b5bab6f1a846b415dd20d45dce3cddbb977ff: Hello again, adventurer! It's good to see you! If it wasn't for your quick thinking, the treacherous Jones would have probably poisoned my family and I by now! We are in your debt.
textByHash.6209aa9220a84ce2e9d259d2d65c4aeeed7b17cf: That's Sir Ceril you blooming scoundrel! Show respect when addressing someone of my rank! I must say, I am a bit disapointed you haven't made any progress. Maybe I was wrong about you.
textByHash.c2876f6a5dce506b6dce51e0dfd0a1c5f4e50fca: Oh the inhumanity... the cruelty... the misery... the pain...
textByHash.7e1d872e1e8abe619708555d1942aabaef81297d: My son is a good boy, really, but how could he give his dinner to Scruffy without having the servants test it for poison first? How? How could he be so thoughtless and careless? He knows we are all under threat!
textByHash.407c344e62713b20ad97b711a0279c8876a5776b: He's been with our family for twenty years... that's 140 in dog years! The poor dog... What did he ever do to deserve such a fate?
textByHash.050c82c53af2815577e1bb4d20a051a5b6f85704: Oh the misery... How could someone do something like this?
textByHash.353aad5fbf032cd0b7f02e0fa4ccba72e46bd0ae: Sir Ceril! Sir! And things are terrible! Our beloved dog is dead, and I fear it's only a matter of time before those cultists strike again!
textByHash.a04de39bc6864f4c07185b9ec817a8ac90ff8a80: Oh... I may be wrong... but ever since I asked for your help, things around here have gone from bad to worse...
textByHash.fd0c86d07a4b6ea09d638be696fc472cc8a4463c: I think you'd better keep out of my way. And for the last time, it's Sir Ceril! Sir! It's not that hard to blooming remember!
